text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can create paintings, compose music, and even write stories. AI-generated art often looks beautiful, and people enjoy listening to AI-created songs. Some authors use AI to help them write poems or novels. But is this real creativity? Human creativity comes from emotion, personal experience, and imagination. Machines follow patterns and data, so they do not truly feel or understand their work. While AI can produce impressive results, it lacks the deep meaning that humans add. Many believe that AI is a useful tool, but true creativity still belongs to people.
